Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Its très difficile to type. Sorry if I make any mistakes.[n]{f 1 5 0}After school I will wait in the hallway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did I spell your name correctly?[n]{f 1 5 0}Lets sew together. I am in the hallway :D[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 2}-dono come to the home ec room please. I need to tell you something :([n]{f 1 5 0}I will wait in the hallway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thank you a million.[n]{f 1 5 0}I want to sew. {f 4 2}-dono I am waiting for you in the home ec room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Is it weird to type that? ↑[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}I am happy that {f 4 2}-dono sews too :-))[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a very good idea. I want to tell you so come see me please.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I want uncle to see kimono. I want to sew with {f 4 2}-dono. We will do well. :-))[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thank you for your help {f 4 2}-dono. Can we make an exceptionnel kimono together?[n]{f 1 5 0}I will go to the home ec room today too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I will finish it today. I want you to see it. I would like you to come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I will come get you for club activities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It is a good day for sewing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello.[n]{f 1 5 0}We have today off. I want to go out, {f 4 2}-dono.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is a French movie today. It is good for learning :D[n]{f 1 5 0}Do you want to go to the cinéma? Lets watch together. I already have tickets :)[n]{f 1 1}
